commitMessage:
Adds build fixture and migrates build CLI tests. (#1848)

- Part of #1833.
- Also changes test directory names to include test ID so that they are
easily identifiable.

body.content:
try buildWithPaths(
            tags: [tag],
            tempContext: tempDir,
            tempDockerfileContext: tempDir,
            buildArgs: buildArgs,
            otherArgs: otherArgs
        )

try buildWithPaths(
            tags: tags,
            tempContext: tempDir,
            tempDockerfileContext: tempDir,
            buildArgs: buildArgs,
            otherArgs: otherArgs
        )

let (_, _, error, status) = try run(arguments: [
            "builder",
            "start",
            "-c",
            "\(cpus)",
            "-m",
            "\(memoryInGBs)GB",
        ])
        if status != 0 {
            throw CLIError.executionFailed("command failed: \(error)")
        }
